Notice And Motion To Compel Responses From Deft Leandre Mathews To Special Interrogatories; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $715.00
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's Motions to Compel responses to special interrogatories, and requests for production of documents is GRANTED. No oppositions have been filed. Judge: Andrew Cheng, not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses From Deft Leandre D. Mathews To Form Interrogatories; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $715.00
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff federal Insurance Company's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition have been filed.
Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,695 against defendant Leandre Matthews pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Sections 2023.040, 2023.010(d). Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Andrew Cheng, not reported.

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses From Deft Leandre D. Mathews To Requests For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $715.00
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's Motions to Compel responses from defendant Leandre D. Mathews to requests for production of documents is GRANTED. No oppositions have been filed. Judge: Andrew Cheng, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses From Defendant Lisa A. Alford To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Lisa A. Alford In The Amount Of $715.00 ; Points And Authorities , Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Motion to compel Lisa A. Alford's responses to request for production of documents, set no. one; and for monetary sanctions;
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client, attorney work product, and Fifth Amendment privilege;
b. Within twenty days of notice of entry of this order, defendant shall serve a full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's request for production of documents, set no. one;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses From Defendant Lisa A. Alford To Special Interrogatories; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Lisa A. Alford In The Amount Of $827.50 ; Points And Authorities , Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Motion to compel Lisa A. Alford's responses to special interrogatories, set no. one; and for monetary sanctions granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client, attorney work product, and Fifth Amendment privilege;
b. Within twenty days of notice of entry of this order, defendant shall serve full, complete an verified response to plaintiff's special interrogatories, set no. one;
c. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant Lisa A. Alford To Form Interrogatories; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Lisa A. Alford In The Amount Of $1,277.50 ; Points And Authorities , Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Motion to compel Lisa A. Alford's responses to form interrogatories, set no. one; and for monetary sanctions granted:
a. Subject to the attorney-client, attorney work product, and Fifth Amendment privilege, defendant shall serve a verified supplemental response to plaintiff's form interrogatories, set no. one;
b. Defendant's supplemental response shall be served within twenty days of notice of entry of this order;
c. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
